items.title: Linear and polynomial regression
items.description: Train with MSE (or MAE) between predicted continuous ŷ and true y — the default objective for house prices, demand forecasting, and sensor readings.

items.title: Logistic regression and neural binary classifiers
items.description: Sigmoid output plus BCE minimizes Bernoulli log-likelihood — spam detection, fraud flags, and medical yes/no screens.

items.title: Multi-class image and text classifiers
items.description: Softmax plus categorical CE is the standard head for digit recognition, topic tagging (single label), and intent classification.

items.title: Gradient-boosted trees
items.description: XGBoost and LightGBM expose reg:squarederror, reg:absoluteerror, binary:logistic, and multi:softmax objectives — the same four loss families under framework names.

items.title: Custom training pipelines
items.description: Any supervised trainer that calls loss.backward() or equivalent is optimizing an empirical average of per-example MSE, MAE, BCE, or CE (or a weighted variant).
